items.name_en: ✨M13397 White & Color. Flap Wallet. New LV x TM Portfolio Sarah NM. A wallet paying tribute to Maison luggage, the 'LV × TM Portfolio Sarah NM'. The slightly rectangular shape features calfskin trimming, with gold screws decorating the corners of the front flap. The playful rainbow-colored letter pattern canvas is exclusive to the reissue of the 'Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami' series. The interior features 2 large compartments and multiple pockets with 12 card slots, which is also very attractive. 19 x 10.5 x 2 cm.

items.name_en: ✨M14194 White Color Mini Baguette Series Nano Diane JhLt Baguette Handbag M14194 White Color (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami) The Nano Diane, crafted from two-tone Monogram Empreinte LT leather, is a miniature version of the iconic Diane bag. This meticulously crafted piece features all key details of the original design, including a round flap, piped edges, and a strap-style magnetic closure. Its detachable handle and detachable adjustable shoulder strap offer different carrying options. Dimensions: 19 x 10.5 x 6 cm
items.name_cn: ✨M14194 White Color Mini Baguette Series Nano Diane JhLt Baguette Handbag M14194 White Color (Three Colors - Takashi Murakami) The Nano Diane, crafted from two-tone Monogram Empreinte LT leather, is a miniature version of the iconic Diane bag. This meticulously crafted piece features all key details of the original design, including a round flap, piped edges, and a strap-style magnetic closure. items.name_cn:
Bottega Veneta 2024 Fall New Handbag
New arrivals from the 2024 Early Autumn collection. The newly launched Let's Go and Kit bags share a similar charm, both featuring a slim, crisp baguette shape. They are sculpted with a three-dimensional structure using Intrecciato woven leather craftsmanship, reimagining classic elements with creative contours. The bag names also have a casual, effortless feel. Let's Go can be worn as a shoulder bag or handbag, with magnets on both sides allowing you to freely adjust the shape from rectangular to trapezoidal for a unique and fun bag.
Style: 796258
Size: 37*13*11.5cm

items.name_en: BV patti bag Full and three-dimensional padded leather strip, understated luxury is often hidden in details and craftsmanship. This bag has a casual opening, simple and elegant overall design, and comes with a detachable shoulder strap for crossbody or handheld wear to match different outfits. The interior features double-layering and a zippered pocket for secure storage of private items. Whether for capacity, style, or privacy, it offers a full sense of security.

items.name_cn:
In stock
Inspired by Brancusi's 20th-century modern sculpture "Bird in Space"
Muse brass handle, unique craftsmanship makes each handle one-of-a-kind, highlighting a precious sculptural feel
The shoulder strap features a metal chain with hardware inlay, adding depth to the bag; the hardware moon god design exudes a premium look
The Sardine handle creates a high-end modern look! The Sardine bag uses Intrecciato weaving to honor the brand's craftsmanship. The handle design creates a strong contrast, presenting an artistic design concept. The finishing of the Muse brass hardware is completed through multiple processes, and exquisite craftsmanship makes each handle unique
Style: 776768
Size: 33*20*4cm (Strap length 35cm)

items.name_cn:
Dimensions: 25×15×5 cm
Hong Kong Channel Shipment! 2024 Latest LV Pea Bean Mother & Child Bag, fashion is a cycle, a style from 20 years ago has been re-released. This design point: one shoulder strap solves the need, can be crossbody or underarm, changing carrying methods anytime and anywhere, suitable for more occasions! Simple and convenient!
The side design adds fashion sense while being practical, paying tribute to LV's classic travel trunk! The special padded wide leather adds comfort to the shoulder and a relaxed casual feel! Suitable for daily commute or travel. Plus, the capacity of this bag is not to be underestimated, it is sure to turn heads 🥰

items.name_cn:
Dimensions: 22.5 x 21 x 7cm
2024 Spring/Summer Runway Collection Shipment! Hong Kong Channel Order, Hong Kong Direct Mail Available! Around Me Round Cake Handbag, M47117 Monogram. This handbag reinterprets the brand's classic LV Circle logo with its unique Monogram coated canvas, appearing in a brand-new look. This round handbag features a one-piece handle that creates a simple and elegant appearance, and its compact structure exudes a trendy vibe. The capacity is sufficient to meet your daily needs, perfectly matching your various styles whether carried on the shoulder or in hand.
